paperTitle: Efficient Diffusion Transformer Policies with Mixture of Expert Denoisers for Multitask Learning

benchmarks.label: CALVIN
benchmarks.detail: Suites: 1 task 91.5 · 2 tasks 79.2 · 3 tasks 67.3 · 4 tasks 55.8 · 5 tasks 45.3 | Table 1 | Notes: ABC→D split (standard). 1000 chains, avg_len metric. Same score also reported in: https://arxiv.org/abs/2502.07837.

benchmarks.label: LIBERO
benchmarks.detail: Suites: libero 10 92 · libero 90 91 | Table 5 | Notes: Only reports LIBERO-10 (Long) and LIBERO-90. The displayed score is the arithmetic mean of those two reported values; missing libero_spatial, libero_object, and libero_goal make it non-standard.
